name: Scanner & Bot Detection
description: Detects automated vulnerability scanners, penetration testing tools, and malicious bots by their user-agent signatures, URL patterns, and behavioral fingerprints. Catches tools like Nmap, Nikto, SQLMap, Burp Suite, and common scraping bots.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Known Scanner User-Agents
rules.description: Blocks requests from known vulnerability scanners and reconnaissance tools.

rules.name: Script Kiddie User-Agents
rules.description: Logs requests from common scripting HTTP clients. Set to log-only since legitimate services may use these.

rules.name: WordPress & CMS Probing
rules.description: Detects probing for WordPress, Joomla, and other CMS admin panels that don't exist on your server.

rules.name: Sensitive File Probing
rules.description: Detects attempts to access sensitive configuration, dependency, and version control files.

rules.name: Backup File Probing
rules.description: Detects attempts to access backup, temporary, and editor swap files.

rules.name: Admin Panel Enumeration
rules.description: Logs attempts to find common admin panel URLs. Set to log since these may be legitimate paths.
